title: mercurialis elliptica
intro: Mercurialis elliptica, also known as Perennial Spurge or Dog's Mercury, is a perennial flowering plant in the spurge family. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mercurialis elliptica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin health. It can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, and is often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote healing in wounds.
